subcodes.first_line: O divine friends, O allies of the Covenant! Praise be unto God that the standard of the Covenant is raised aloft and the effulgent lights emanate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی ای یاران میثاق الحمد لله علم میثاق بلند است و انوار اشراق از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
